description: Create a 'Members Only' product page for VIP customers. Add a 'VIP' taxonomy term to the 'Product categories' vocabulary and assign it to 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' and 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse'. Configure a new Page View titled 'VIP Exclusives' at the path /vip-products using a grid display. The page must filter for products in the 'VIP' category and be restricted to Authenticated users, ensuring anonymous visitors receive a 403 Access Denied response at http://localhost/vip-products.
